falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a trend reversal rather than consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price drops below the previous 6-month low by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant bearish breakdown would contradict the HOLD signal, showing a definitive trend shift rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match percentage to bottom_2022_may_luna falls below 50% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the original analysis, suggesting the current setup is no longer analogous to the prior bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
